relationship: 進路に迷っている友達同士
setting: 放課後の帰り道、将来の選択に迷っている友達を励ます
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I'm free to be whatever I
Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
I'm free to say whatever I
Whatever I like if it's wrong or right, it's alright
[Chorus]
Always seems to me
You only see what people want you to see
How long's it gonna be
Before we get on the bus and 'cause no fuss?
Get a grip on yourself
It don't cost much
[Verse 2]
Free to be whatever you
Whatever you say if it comes my way, it's alright
You're free to be wherever you
Wherever you please you can shoot the breeze if you want
[Chorus]
It always seems to me
You only see what people want you to see
How long's it gonna be
Before we get on the bus and 'cause no fuss?
Get a grip on yourself
It don't cost much
[Verse 3]
I'm free to be whatever I
Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
[Bridge]
Here in my mind
You know you might find
Something that you
You thought you once knew
But now it's all gone
And you know it's no fun
Yeah, I know it's no fun
Oh, I know it's no fun
[Verse 4]
I'm free to be whatever I
Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
I'm free to be whatever I
Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
[Outro]
Whatever you do
Whatever you say
Yeah, I know it's alright
Whatever you do
Whatever you say
Yeah, I know it's alright

lyricsJa.en: I'm free to be whatever I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は何にだってなれる

lyricsJa.en: Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
lyricsJa.ja: 自分で選べるし、歌いたければブルースだって歌う

lyricsJa.en: I'm free to say whatever I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は何だって言える

lyricsJa.en: Whatever I like if it's wrong or right, it's alright
lyricsJa.ja: 好きなことを言える、間違っていようが正しかろうが大丈夫
いつも僕にはそう見える

lyricsJa.en: You only see what people want you to see
lyricsJa.ja: 君は人が見せたいものだけを見ている
あとどれくらいかかるんだろう

lyricsJa.en: Before we get on the bus and 'cause no fuss?
lyricsJa.ja: 騒ぎ立てずにバスに乗れるようになるまで
しっかりしろよ
それに大したことじゃない
君だって何にでもなれる

lyricsJa.en: Whatever you say if it comes my way, it's alright
lyricsJa.ja: 君が何を言っても、それが僕のほうへ来るなら大丈夫

lyricsJa.en: You're free to be wherever you
lyricsJa.ja: 君はどこにいたって自由だ

lyricsJa.en: Wherever you please you can shoot the breeze if you want
lyricsJa.ja: 好きな場所で、望むなら気楽におしゃべりすればいい
いつも僕にはそう見える

lyricsJa.en: You only see what people want you to see
lyricsJa.ja: 君は人が見せたいものだけを見ている
あとどれくらいかかるんだろう

lyricsJa.en: I'm free to be whatever I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は何にだってなれる

lyricsJa.en: Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
lyricsJa.ja: 自分で選べるし、歌いたければブルースだって歌う
僕の心の中では
君は見つけるかもしれない
君がかつて
知っていると思っていた何かを
でも今はもう全部消えてしまった

lyricsJa.en: And you know it's no fun
lyricsJa.ja: それが楽しくないことは君にもわかるだろう

lyricsJa.en: Yeah, I know it's no fun
lyricsJa.ja: そう、僕にも楽しくないってわかる

lyricsJa.en: Oh, I know it's no fun
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、楽しくなんかない

lyricsJa.en: I'm free to be whatever I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は何にだってなれる

lyricsJa.en: Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
lyricsJa.ja: 自分で選べるし、歌いたければブルースだって歌う

lyricsJa.en: I'm free to be whatever I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は何にだってなれる

lyricsJa.en: Whatever I choose and I'll sing the blues if I want
lyricsJa.ja: 自分で選べるし、歌いたければブルースだって歌う
君が何をしても
君が何を言っても
ああ、大丈夫だって僕にはわかってる
君が何をしても
君が何を言っても
ああ、大丈夫だって僕にはわかってる

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I keep thinking I should choose something practical, but I don't even know what I want anymore.
sentences.displayHtml: I keep thinking I should choose something practical, but I don't even know what I want anymore.

conversation.japanese: 現実的なものを選ぶべきだってずっと考えてるけど、もう自分が何を望んでるのかもわからない。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Then start with whatever I choose.
sentences.displayHtml: Then start with whatever I choose.

sentences.text: It doesn't have to impress everyone.
sentences.displayHtml: It doesn't have to impress everyone.

conversation.japanese: それなら、「自分が選ぶもの」から始めなよ。みんなを感心させる必要はないんだから。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It just seems to me that everyone already has their life figured out.
sentences.displayHtml: It just seems to me that everyone already has their life figured out.

conversation.japanese: 僕には、みんなもう人生の答えを見つけてるように見えるんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Maybe you're only seeing what people want you to see.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe you're only seeing what people want you to see.

conversation.japanese: たぶん君は、人が見せたいものだけを見てるんだよ。誰もぐちゃぐちゃな部分は見せないから。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I wish I could just say whatever I like without worrying about sounding stupid.
sentences.displayHtml: I wish I could just say whatever I like without worrying about sounding stupid.

conversation.japanese: バカに聞こえるかなんて気にせず、好きなことを言えたらいいのに。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: And honestly, It don't cost much to be honest with yourself.
sentences.displayHtml: And honestly, It don't cost much to be honest with yourself.

conversation.japanese: 言えるよ。それに正直、自分に素直になるのに大した代償はいらない。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I need to get a grip on yourself before I let fear decide for me.
sentences.displayHtml: I need to get a grip on yourself before I let fear decide for me.

conversation.japanese: たぶん君の言う通りだ。怖さに決めさせる前に、しっかりしないと。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Whatever you say tomorrow, make sure it sounds like you.
sentences.displayHtml: Whatever you say tomorrow, make sure it sounds like you.

conversation.japanese: その通り。明日何を言うにしても、それが君らしい言葉になるようにね。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Here in my mind, I keep hearing my old teacher saying I had more options than I thought.
sentences.displayHtml: Here in my mind, I keep hearing my old teacher saying I had more options than I thought.

conversation.japanese: 心の中で、昔の先生が「思ってるより選択肢は多い」って言ってるのが聞こえるんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: If you slow down, you might find the confidence you once knew.
sentences.displayHtml: If you slow down, you might find the confidence you once knew.

conversation.japanese: じゃあ、それを聞いて。少し落ち着けば、昔持っていた自信を見つけられるかもしれない。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I hope so, because pretending I'm fine is no fun anymore.
sentences.displayHtml: I hope so, because pretending I'm fine is no fun anymore.

conversation.japanese: そうだといいな。平気なふりをするのは、もう楽しくないから。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Pick one honest step, and we'll take it from there.
sentences.displayHtml: Pick one honest step, and we'll take it from there.

conversation.japanese: じゃあ、ふりをするのはやめよう。正直な一歩をひとつ選んで、そこから進めばいい。
